description: Give your customers a chance at some great deals with this Cyber Monday email template. This email creates a sense of urgency and convinces your customers to buy from your business now. The dark blue template can be designed to shape your business with bold CTAs, brand logos, icons and so much more.

designer.description: I'm a Product Designer passionate about creating meaningful, relevant and inclusive solutions for people.
